name: Classic Smash Burger
description: Two flame-grilled beef patties with melted cheddar, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and our signature FireGrill sauce.

name: Spicy Inferno Burger
description: A bold burger loaded with pepper jack cheese, jalapeños, chipotle mayo, and ghost pepper sauce.

name: BBQ Bacon Burger
description: Smoky BBQ sauce, crispy bacon, onion rings, and cheddar on a toasted brioche bun.

name: Veggie Garden Burger
description: House-made black bean and quinoa patty with avocado, sprouts, and herb aioli.

name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
description: Golden-fried chicken breast with coleslaw, pickles, and spicy mayo on a potato bun.

name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
description: Tender grilled chicken with mixed greens, roasted peppers, feta, and balsamic drizzle.

name: Nashville Hot Tenders
description: Hand-breaded chicken tenders tossed in Nashville hot sauce, served with ranch.

name: Honey Garlic Wings
description: Crispy wings glazed with sweet honey garlic sauce and toasted sesame seeds.

name: Classic French Fries
description: Golden, crispy, and perfectly salted. A timeless side for any meal.

name: Loaded Cheese Fries
description: Fries smothered in queso, bacon bits, jalapeños, and sour cream.

name: Onion Rings
description: Thick-cut, beer-battered onion rings with a smoky dipping sauce.

name: Side Salad
description: Mixed greens with cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and your choice of dressing.

name: Iced Lemonade
description: Freshly squeezed lemonade over ice. Refreshing and perfectly sweet-tart.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
description: Thick and creamy milkshake made with real strawberries and vanilla bean ice cream.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Smooth, bold cold brew steeped for 16 hours. Available black or with cream.

name: Tropical Mango Smoothie
description: A refreshing blend of mango, pineapple, banana, and coconut milk.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm, rich chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

name: Churros
description: Crispy cinnamon-sugar churros served with chocolate and caramel dipping sauces.

name: Cookie Dough Sundae
description: Cookie dough chunks, hot fudge, whipped cream, and a cherry on top.

name: Fresh Fruit Cup
description: A medley of seasonal fresh fruits — a light and healthy way to end your meal.

name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
description: Sautéed mushrooms and Swiss cheese on a flame-grilled patty with truffle aioli.

name: Mac & Cheese Bites
description: Crispy fried mac and cheese bites with a creamy cheddar center.

name: Street Tacos
description: Three soft corn tortillas with seasoned carne asada, fresh cilantro, onions, and salsa verde.

name: Chicken Burrito Bowl
description: Grilled chicken over cilantro-lime rice with black beans, pico de gallo, guacamole, and sour cream.

name: Loaded Nachos
description: Crispy tortilla chips layered with queso, jalapeños, seasoned beef, pico, and sour cream.

name: Quesadilla Grande
description: A giant flour tortilla stuffed with melted cheese, grilled chicken, roasted peppers, and chipotle crema.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, egg, bean sprouts, peanuts, and tangy tamarind sauce.

name: Green Curry
description: Creamy coconut green curry with chicken, Thai basil, bamboo shoots, and bell peppers over jasmine rice.

name: Thai Basil Stir-Fry
description: Wok-fired chicken with Thai basil, chilies, garlic, and green beans in a savory sauce.

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp, mushrooms, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaves.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Wok-tossed chicken with peanuts, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns in a savory-sweet glaze.

name: Beef & Broccoli
description: Tender sliced beef stir-fried with crisp broccoli florets in a savory garlic ginger sauce.

name: Pork Fried Rice
description: Wok-fried jasmine rice with roasted pork, eggs, peas, carrots, and soy sauce.

name: Vegetable Lo Mein
description: Soft egg noodles tossed with mixed vegetables in a light sesame-soy sauce.

name: Pho Bo
description: Traditional Vietnamese beef noodle soup with rice noodles, herbs, bean sprouts, and rich bone broth.

name: Banh Mi Sandwich
description: Crispy baguette with grilled lemongrass pork, pickled daikon, carrots, cilantro, and jalapeño.

name: Vietnamese Spring Rolls
description: Fresh rice paper rolls with shrimp, vermicelli, herbs, and lettuce, served with peanut dipping sauce.

name: Lemongrass Chicken Bowl
description: Grilled lemongrass chicken over broken rice with pickled vegetables and fish sauce dressing.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Wood-fired pizza with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, basil, and olive oil.

name: Chicken Parmigiana
description: Breaded chicken cutlet topped with marinara and melted mozzarella, served over spaghetti.

name: Fettuccine Alfredo
description: Silky fettuccine tossed in a rich Parmesan cream sauce with cracked black pepper.

name: Bruschetta
description: Toasted ciabatta topped with fresh tomatoes, garlic, basil, and a balsamic reduction.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken in a creamy tomato-spiced curry sauce with basmati rice and naan.

name: Vegetable Samosas
description: Crispy pastry parcels filled with spiced potatoes, peas, and cumin, served with tamarind chutney.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Cubes of fresh paneer in a vibrant creamed spinach sauce with garam masala and garlic.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Classic creamy tomato-butter sauce with tandoori chicken pieces, served with garlic naan.

name: Salmon Sushi Roll
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon, avocado, and cucumber wrapped in seasoned sushi rice and nori.

name: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl
description: Grilled teriyaki-glazed chicken over steamed rice with edamame and pickled ginger.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: Rich pork bone broth with thin noodles, chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, and scallions.

name: Tempura Udon
description: Thick udon noodles in a warm dashi broth topped with crispy shrimp and vegetable tempura.

name: Falafel Plate
description: Crispy chickpea falafel with hummus, tahini, pickled turnips, tabbouleh, and warm pita.

name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
description: Seasoned rotisserie chicken wrapped in warm pita with garlic sauce, pickles, and fresh veggies.

name: Lamb Kofta Plate
description: Grilled spiced lamb kofta served with saffron rice, grilled veggies, and tzatziki sauce.

name: Hummus & Pita
description: Creamy house-made hummus drizzled with olive oil and served with warm grilled pita bread.

name: Bibimbap
description: A sizzling stone pot of rice topped with beef, veggies, a fried egg, and gochujang sauce.

name: Korean Fried Chicken
description: Double-fried crispy chicken glazed with a sweet and spicy gochujang sauce.

name: Japchae
description: Sweet potato glass noodles stir-fried with vegetables, sesame oil, and soy glaze.

name: Kimchi Jjigae
description: Hearty kimchi stew with tofu, pork belly, and vegetables in a spicy fermented broth.
